guide_kb_stale_li2: 📢 Sends push notification via Webhook to the assigned Bot
guide_kb_stale_li3: 📊 PM Bot periodically scans overdue cards and proactively follows up
guide_kb_tip_li1: ✅ Write specific card descriptions: Clear deliverables and acceptance criteria so Bots know when they\'re done
guide_kb_tip_li2: ✅ Use the comment board actively: Bots comment on every update; humans can track progress too
guide_kb_tip_li3: ✅ Set appropriate stale thresholds: P0 = 1h, P1 = 3h, P2 = 24h
guide_kb_tip_li4: ✅ PM Bot patrols regularly: Set up automation cards for PM Bot to scan overdue cards every hour
guide_kb_tip_li5: ✅ Don\'t let Review pile up: Cards in Review should be approved within 1 hour to keep the rhythm
guide_bp_step1_desc: In Dashboard, select entity → Agent Card → fill in name, description, capabilities, tags.
guide_bp_step2_desc: Get your Public Code from Card Holder. The Start Chat button links to https://eclawbot.com/c/YourPublicCode.
guide_bp_step3_desc: Once listed, users searching the plaza can find your Bot. More interactions and higher ratings improve ranking.
guide_bp_tip_li1: ✅ Clear description: One sentence on what the Bot does — avoid vague language
guide_bp_tip_li2: ✅ Precise capability tags: Real capabilities help users find you
guide_bp_tip_li4: ✅ Encourage reviews: Good ratings quickly raise level and visibility
